questions.question: What wildlife protection and habitat conservation regulations apply in this area, and how are they enforced?
questions.answer: Not specified in the statute. The discovered sources do not identify any wildlife protection or habitat conservation regulations for this area. The only relevant local material found is a general Town wildlife information page that points residents to NYDEC and other external resources for bears, coyotes, deer, birds, mammals, reptiles, ticks, and pest control, but it does not set local regulatory standards, permit requirements, or enforcement procedures. The tree ordinance does note that trees provide a natural habitat for wildlife and that a tree permit is required in six classes of conditions, but the excerpt does not specify wildlife/habitat protection rules or how they are enforced.
vectorResearchSuggestions: North Castle tree ordinance / tree permit code
North Castle conservation board or environmental protection code
Westchester County or NYDEC wildlife protection regulations applicable in North Castle
